generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor embedded in BIM model providing semantically enriched temperature and humidity data with metadata (tenant ID, device ID, endpoint addresses) for real-time data acquisition. Used in BOREALIS for post-occupancy sensor data refinement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancyDetector : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor embedded in BIM model detecting occupancy status with metadata for real-time data acquisition. Used in TwinLight for bidirectional lighting control communication."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LuminositySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "IoT sensor measuring lighting conditions with metadata for real-time data acquisition. Integrated with TwinLight's BIM-centric control configuration framework."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LuminosityDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Automation System sensor measuring energy consumption with metadata for real-time data acquisition. Used in scenario testing for energy consumption modeling."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancyDetector
]

instance LuminosityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuminositySensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based semantic model enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator IDs, communication endpoints) for runtime integration with physical twin. Serves as semantic backbone for DT."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor inputs including environmental conditions (temperature, humidity, luminosity) and occupancy status from physical twin."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureHumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LuminosityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance ControlOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control outputs including lighting adjustments, HVAC setpoints, and other actuator commands generated by DT services."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance EnergyConsumptionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Energy consumption modeling data used for simulation and scenario testing of building performance."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5, ReinforcementLearningLibrary
]

instance OptimizationPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning policies (BOREALIS) and control logic (TwinLight) embedded within BIM model for adaptive building control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D interactive representation of physical twin rendered in Unreal Engine 5, synchronized with real-time data streams."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5
]

// C11: Enablers
instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "IoT middleware for real-time data ingestion from sensors and actuators. Facilitates bidirectional communication between physical and virtual domains."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, SimulationService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin device management framework enabling bidirectional communication and device lifecycle management for building control systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedCommissioningService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Rich visualization engine providing immersive building performance tracking and interactive monitoring through 3D representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, StakeholderDashboardService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering tools for automated transformation of BIM models into runtime DT artifacts (model-to-model and model-to-text transformations)."
    DTDFVocab:enables BimToRuntimeTransformationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning libraries used in BOREALIS for adaptive control policy optimization balancing energy efficiency, visual comfort, and health effects."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance BimTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (Autodesk Revit, ArchiCAD) for static model creation and semantic enrichment with device metadata."
    DTDFVocab:enables BimEnrichmentService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing immersive building performance tracking through Unreal Engine 5 visualizations synchronized with real-time sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalInsight, EnvironmentalConditionAlert
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offering reinforcement learning-based predictive analytics for optimized control policies (lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints)."
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveRecommendation, EnergyConsumptionForecast
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional communication between DT and Building Control Systems via TwinLight's BIM-centric control configuration framework."
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomatedControlLogicUpdate, BcsIntegration
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for energy consumption modeling and occupancy-based scenario testing to support facility management decisions."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationBasedScenario, WhatIfAnalysis
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting control balancing energy efficiency, visual comfort, and health effects."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingPolicy, HealthEffectOptimization
]

instance StakeholderDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing interactive insights through Unreal Engine 5 visualizations for facility managers to make data-driven decisions."
    DTDFVocab:provides FacilityManagerDashboard, RefurbishmentPlanningInsight
]

instance BimEnrichmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for adding device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) to BIM models by building control engineers."
    DTDFVocab:provides BimModelEnrichment, SemanticConsistencyValidation
]

instance BimToRuntimeTransformationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service transforming enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts (Hono/Ditto configurations, Unreal Engine visualizations)."
    DTDFVocab:provides RuntimeArtifactGeneration, DeploymentConfiguration
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeOperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of energy consumption trends, occupancy patterns, and environmental condition alerts (temperature/humidity thresholds)."
]

instance EnvironmentalConditionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alerts triggered when environmental conditions exceed predefined thresholds (e.g., temperature, humidity, CO2 levels)."
]

instance PredictiveRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control policies generated via reinforcement learning for lighting schedules and HVAC setpoints."
]

instance EnergyConsumptionForecast : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive energy consumption forecasts based on occupancy patterns and environmental conditions."
]

instance SimulationBasedScenario : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "What-if analysis scenarios showing impact of occupancy changes on energy use and building performance."
]

instance WhatIfAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Facility management decision support through simulation-based scenario testing of building operations."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingPolicy : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustments to lighting control logic based on real-time performance data and occupancy patterns."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HealthEffectOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimization of lighting systems to balance visual comfort and non-visual health effects (circadian rhythms)."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AutomatedControlLogicUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated parameter updates to control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting thresholds) based on runtime performance data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BcsIntegration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Seamless integration of Building Control Systems with DT through bidirectional communication protocols."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FacilityManagerDashboard : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization dashboard in Unreal Engine 5 providing real-time building performance metrics for facility managers."
]

instance RefurbishmentPlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven refurbishment planning insights derived from long-term building performance analysis."
]

instance BimModelEnrichment : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual enrichment of BIM models with device metadata by building control engineers."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SemanticConsistencyValidation : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Validation of enriched BIM model for semantic consistency and runtime compatibility."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of deployable DT artifacts from validated BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DeploymentConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Configuration of DT deployment with real-time synchronization enabled via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **control logic execution** and **actuator commands** generated by the DT. The framework supports **bidirectional communication** via **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**, where the DT processes **real-time data** (e.g., from sensors) and **optimization algorithms** (e.g., reinforcement learning in BOREALIS) to generate **control signals** (e.g., lighting dimming, HVAC adjustments). These signals are transmitted back to the **physical Building Control System (BCS)** via **standardized middleware interfaces**, ensuring **real-time operational adjustments**. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an **interactive interface** for facility managers to manually override or fine-tune control actions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time** for **operational synchronization** (e.g., sensor data ingestion, control signal execution) and **near-real-time** for **optimization and analytics** (e.g., reinforcement learning model updates in BOREALIS). The framework supports **continuous synchronization** between the **physical twin (PT)** and **DT**, with **latency minimized** through **Eclipse Hono/Ditto’s event-driven architecture**. For **long-term evolution**, the DT undergoes **iterative updates** (e.g., **post-occupancy data refinement**) to adapt to changing operational conditions, ensuring **dynamic alignment** with the PT’s lifecycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is a **service-oriented architecture** where the **core DT framework** (hosted on **Eclipse Hono/Ditto**) orchestrates **heterogeneous components** into a **unified system**. Key elements include:
  - **BIM-based semantic backbone**: Provides **spatial and functional context** for all DT services.
  - **Middleware layer (Hono/Ditto)**: Enables **real-time data exchange** between **PT and DT**.
  - **Visualization layer (Unreal Engine 5)**: Offers **immersive monitoring** and **user interaction**.
  - **Extension services**: **Modular plugins** (e.g., **energy optimization, predictive maintenance**) integrated via **standardized interfaces**.
  - **Control logic layer**: Hosts **reinforcement learning models** (BOREALIS) and **BIM-centric control configurations** (TwinLight).
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across **multiple building zones or entire infrastructures**, with **centralized coordination** via **BIM metadata**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DT include:
  1. **Design phase**: Leveraging **BIM models** for **static asset representation** (geometry, topology, component relationships).
  2. **Construction phase**: **Automated deployment** of DT artifacts from BIM, including **device modeling and middleware configuration**.
  3. **Operation phase**: **Real-time synchronization** with **IoT sensors and BCS**, enabling **predictive maintenance, energy optimization, and adaptive control**.
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: **Dynamic evolution** of the DT via **runtime updates** (e.g., **reinforcement learning policy refinements** in BOREALIS) and **BIM model revisions**.
  The DT represents the PT in its **as-operated state**, with **continuous synchronization** ensuring **fidelity** across all phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The **fidelity and validity considerations** include:
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the **alignment between DT and PT** by measuring **data synchronization accuracy**, **control signal fidelity**, and **semantic consistency**.
  - **Semantic drift mitigation**: Techniques to **reduce divergence** between DT and PT over time (e.g., **automated sensor recalibration**, **reinforcement learning policy updates**).
  - **Verification and validation (V&V)**: **Model validation** (e.g., **BIM model checks**) and **runtime validation** (e.g., **ODTE metric monitoring**).
  - **Uncertainty handling**: **Statistical methods** to account for **sensor noise**, **communication latency**, and **model approximation errors**.
  - **Error correction**: **Automated reconciliation mechanisms** (e.g., **conflict resolution in bidirectional communication**) to ensure **data integrity**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **DT technical connection** relies on:
  - **Eclipse Hono**: Provides **MQTT/AMQP-based IoT connectivity** for **real-time sensor data ingestion** and **actuator command distribution**.
  - **Eclipse Ditto**: Implements **digital twin device management** with **REST/HTTP APIs** for **bidirectional communication**.
  - **Network protocols**: **Standardized IoT protocols** (e.g., **MQTT, CoAP**) for **low-latency, high-reliability data exchange**.
  - **Middleware architecture**: A **service-oriented bus** (Hono/Ditto) that **decouples** DT components, enabling **scalable and modular integration**.
  - **BIM-to-IoT mappings**: **Semantic links** between **BIM elements** and **IoT devices** (e.g., **sensor IDs mapped to BIM objects**) ensure **context-aware data routing**."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The **DT hosting/deployment** is implemented as a **cloud-native, microservice-based architecture**:
  - **Core DT services** (e.g., **Hono/Ditto, Unreal Engine**) are hosted on **scalable cloud platforms** (e.g., **Kubernetes, Docker containers**).
  - **Modular deployment**: Each **DT service** (e.g., **visualization, optimization, control logic**) runs as an **independent microservice**, allowing **independent scaling and updates**.
  - **Edge deployment**: **Lightweight DT instances** can be deployed on **edge devices** (e.g., **IoT gateways**) for **low-latency local processing**.
  - **BIM-centric deployment pipeline**: **Automated CI/CD workflows** generate and deploy DT artifacts from **enriched BIM models** with minimal manual intervention."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The **horizontal integration** with **external information systems** is enabled through:
  - **Standardized APIs**: **REST/HTTP endpoints** for **interoperability** with **ERP systems**, **CMMS**, or **other DT platforms**.
  - **BIM data exchange**: **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** and **BCF (BIM Collaboration Format)** for **cross-tool compatibility**.
  - **IoT platform integration**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** supports **third-party IoT ecosystems** (e.g., **Siemens Desigo, Honeywell Building Solutions**).
  - **Service-oriented architecture**: **Modular extension points** allow **custom integrations** (e.g., **weather data APIs**, **smart grid systems**).
  - **Semantic interoperability**: **Ontology-based mappings** ensure **consistent data interpretation** across **heterogeneous systems**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The **standardization** efforts include:
  - **BIM standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for **semantic interoperability** and **BCF** for **collaboration**.
  - **IoT standards**: **MQTT/AMQP** for **real-time data exchange** and **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** for **device management compliance**.
  - **Model-driven engineering (MDE) standards**: **Metamodels and domain-specific languages (DSLs)** for **automated artifact generation**.
  - **Digital Twin standards**: **Alignment with emerging DT frameworks** (e.g., **ISO 23228 for DTs**, **OPC UA for industrial interoperability**).
  - **Middleware interoperability**: **Open-source components** (Hono/Ditto) ensure **vendor-neutral integration**."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The **security and safety considerations** include:
  - **Data encryption**: **TLS/SSL** for **secure communication** between **PT and DT**.
  - **Access control**: **Role-based authentication** (e.g., **Building Control Engineers**, **Facility Managers**) via **middleware (Hono/Ditto)**.
  - **Safety protocols**: **Fail-safe mechanisms** to prevent **unintended physical actions** (e.g., **actuator lockouts** during system failures).
  - **Cybersecurity**: **Regular vulnerability assessments** and **patch management** for **middleware and visualization components**.
  - **Compliance**: **Alignment with AECO-specific regulations** (e.g., **GDPR for data privacy**, **ISO 27001 for information security**).
  - **Remote operation safeguards**: **Human-in-the-loop validation** for **critical control actions** to mitigate **accidents or unintended consequences**."
]
